confidence_calibration.risk_called_out: exhaustion after 5 straight up sessions, failed continuation, seller acceptance below early support
confidence_calibration.note: Miss was in base-case selection, not risk framing. Confidence calibration was good.

summary: Good risk framing and decent afternoon/lunch read, but core calls on direction, open type, structure, GOAT, and net range missed.
lessons: Separate trend-regime continuation from exhaustion-after-extension scenarios when prior week is 5+ green days straight
Weight opening-fade risk more heavily after close-near-high streaks - continuation becomes less reliable not more
Split GOAT into primary impulse and best reversal trade - today's best long came AFTER the bearish GOAT not instead of it
Forecast net close outcome and intraday path independently - today path offered long opportunity even though day still closed red
